entries.reason: project-specific upstream watcher: tracks rsteckler/applaud and iiAtlas/plaud-recording-downloader (the two upstream projects plaud-mirror reuses code/contracts from). Not generalizable to LLM-DocKit template — every downstream watches different upstreams.

project-specific glob list: each downstream's external-context update triggers are a different set of files (here: PROJECT_CONTEXT, ARCHITECTURE, AUTH_AND_SYNC, DEPLOY_PLAYBOOK). The TEMPLATE for the rule lives upstream as require-docs-on-code-change.md; the data (which globs trigger which check) is intentionally local.

DF-028 candidate-for-absorption upstream to LLM-DocKit. Layer-1 prose-drift detector built in plaud-mirror v0.5.4 after six recurrences of the prose-drift class. Once LLM-DocKit accepts DF-028 (currently 'candidate' status; resolution path candidate→validated→tracked→adopted) and absorbs the script into ~/src/LLM-DocKit/scripts/, this baseline entry should be removed and the local file deleted in favour of the synced upstream copy.

project-specific operator helper: stores PLAUD_MIRROR_ADMIN_PASSPHRASE (D-018) in Doppler project plaud-mirror per home-infra secrets convention. Secret names, Doppler project, and runtime injection path are all plaud-mirror-specific; not generalizable to the LLM-DocKit template.
Project-specific Node and integration test discovery for this TypeScript monorepo; test roots, compiled suffixes, and runtime layout are not LLM-DocKit scaffold concerns.
Project-specific Plaud Mirror provider conformance probe
Project-specific Plaud Mirror compatibility-profile manifest verifier
